mapper.select: SELECT id, email, phone, password_hash, nickname, real_name, avatar_url, role, status, email_verified, phone_verified, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, email, phone, password_hash, nickname, real_name, avatar_url, role, status, email_verified, phone_verified, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(email, phone, password_hash, nickname, role, status, email_verified) VALUES(#{email}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{role}, #{status}, #{emailVerified})

INSERT INTO users(email, phone, password_hash, nickname, real_name, role, status, email_verified, phone_verified) VALUES(#{email}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{realName}, 'USER', 'NORMAL', 0, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_verification_code_log(target, target_type, scene, send_status, ip_address) VALUES(#{target}, #{targetType}, #{scene}, #{sendStatus}, #{ipAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, phone, nickname, real_name, avatar_url, role, status, email_verified, phone_verified, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE role = #{role} AND status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = #{role} AND status != 'DELETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{toStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{fromStatus}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('PENDING_PAYMENT','ISSUED','CHANGED','CHANGE_PENDING')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM passenger WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM waitlist_order WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refund_record rr JOIN ticket_order o ON rr.order_id = o.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM change_record cr JOIN ticket_order o ON cr.order_id = o.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM oauth_account WHERE user_id = #{userId})
